scientific_question: Prospective replication of the calibration-generated hypothesis: the frozen recurrent policies materially outperform the complete 65,536-calendar open-loop frontier (H_OL) and are practically equivalent or superior to the best frozen classical belief controller (Delta_N), on entirely new tapes, under identical resources.
sequential_research_disclosure: Hypothesis GENERATED by the O-R calibration (7480001-48, STOP_CALIBRATION_NOT_ELIGIBLE stands untouched) and TESTED prospectively here. Not a rescue: O and O-R verdicts immutable; virgin 7480101-48 sealed forever.

models.checkpoints: the ten O-R checkpoints by SHA-256 from results/program_o/ret_only_learner_v1/vps_run/custody/model_files.sha256

challenger_clause_david.sandbox: namespaces 9491*/9492* + optimizer seeds 9201+, unlimited iteration, SANDBOX_DEVELOPMENT_ONLY_NOT_PROMOTABLE
challenger_clause_david.nomination: freeze code+hyperparams+history+hash -> ONE blind qualification on 950100001-950100096 (96 tapes/cell) vs RecurrentPPO at equal budget
challenger_clause_david.if_qualified: retrain from scratch 10 fresh optimizer seeds x 200,192 steps on a NEW 250,240-tape pool; freeze checkpoints; becomes Program Q primary
challenger_clause_david.if_not_or_absent: Program Q primary = the historical frozen RecurrentPPO; David keeps experimenting without delaying Q
challenger_clause_david.namespace_guard: fail-closed against 742/743/747/748/749/950 outside their authorized phase

tapes.collision_scan: repo-wide grep for 749 seed usage committed clean before freeze
tapes.power_basis: research/paper2_exhaustive_search/program_q_power_20260718.json (frozen rule: smallest N in {128,160,192,256} with power>=0.80 on both endpoints; E1=1.000, E2=0.806 at N=128; auditor MAY raise to 160 (E2=0.893) during pre-seed adjudication, never after)

primary_endpoints.E1_replicated_adaptation: simultaneous LCB95(H_OL) >= 0.01 in every cell; >=70% favorable tapes vs open-loop; >=8/10 learner seeds with H_OL>0

E2_neural_relation.equivalence_TOST: CI95(Delta_N) fully inside [-0.01,+0.01] in every cell (two one-sided, margin = pre-existing 0.01 practical threshold, frozen before any 749 tape)
E2_neural_relation.noninferiority_floor: LCB95(Delta_N) >= -0.01 with >=8/10 seeds mean Delta_N > -0.01 (non-inferiority seed rule, NOT positivity)

inference.method: studentized max-t, hierarchical (E1 primary cell-family -> E2 -> robustness -> guardrails), NOT a 69-estimand family

comparators.open_loop: all 65,536 calendars, best by MEAN never per-tape max
comparators.classical_strict: best of the ten frozen controllers per cell (primary bar)
comparators.classical_universal: single globally-best frozen controller across cells (secondary bar: universality argument)

guards_unchanged: exact resource equality incl. full frontier
evaluator v1_2 machinery + hash-bound authorization chain
adjudicator exit-code semantics FIXED (scientific STOP is not FAILED_INFRASTRUCTURE)
secondary_report_only: ret_visible_cvar10 with CI (never a gate; no tail-safe claim)
M1 dual-semantics sensitivity (both same-time event orderings on burned tapes; sign/size survival reported)

computational_benchmark_mandatory.per_decision_latency: median + p95, warm-up, batch=1, equal hardware/threading
computational_benchmark_mandatory.claim_if_parity_and_faster: computational incremental value (amortization), never outcome superiority

implementation_split.independent_verifier: the other, verifies freeze + smoke BEFORE 7490001 opens
implementation_split.custody: watcher-first PGID/SID, manifests, verdict pushed same session
